output_debit_classifier.reason: This is a share conversion transaction where preferred shares are converted into common shares. Under IFRS, when shares are converted, the carrying value of the original shares is transferred to the new share class at book value. The transaction states that 50 preferred shares with a carrying value of $100 are converted to 25 common shares. We debit (decrease) Preferred Shares by $100 and credit (increase) Common Shares by $100. No gain or loss is recognized on conversion. Total debits ($100) equal total credits ($100).
